notes: Initial broad allowlist for the canonical settings/tags migration.
Phase 1 should replace these broad buckets with key-level classifications in legacy-state-map.json.

categories.name: temp-session-flags
categories.description: Short-lived runtime/session flags that should remain flags and must not promote into canonical settings.

categories.name: runtime-counters
categories.description: Counters and runtime values that are progression/stat data rather than user preferences.

categories.name: known-compatibility-aliases
categories.description: Old yes/no/value keys that permanently mirror canonical settings for old scripts and old installs.

categories.name: historical-progression-counters
categories.description: Long-term progression state that should be structured before any old key is removed.

categories.name: media-tag-compatibility
categories.description: Legacy tag mirror files and path-based tag claims that should import/export through the media catalog.

temporaryPolicy.reason: Phase 0 only proves audit tooling works. Phase 1 will classify exact keys.
